subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou art my mighty refuge and my lofty sanctuary. Thou beholdest me shedding tears, heaving sighs that ascend on high [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا کهفی المنیع و ملاذی الرفیع ترانی سائل العبرات و صاعد الزفرات و مشتد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
